data.title: Bitcoin News: New Upgrade Drops With Dust, Speed, Security Boosts
data.description:
Bitcoin news hit the wire on March 28, 2025, as BTC, with a market cap exceeding $1. 7 trillion, rolled out a major core update. The Bitcoin development team tweeted about Bitcoin Core v29. 0rc2, a release candidate that builds on October 2024’s v28
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/28/bitcoin-news-new-upgrade-drops-with-dust-speed-security-boosts/

data.title: Top five PR & Marketing Firms in Web3 and Emerging Tech
data.description:
Emerging tech and Web3 companies are rapidly transforming the digital landscape, reshaping how businesses and individuals interact with technology, and unlocking new efficiencies and opportunities. Despite rapid progress, many Web3 and emerging tech projects remain complex and unfamiliar to the broader market, making a strong PR strategy essential. A well-executed PR strategy is crucial for […]

data.title: Bitcoin's Market Cap Projected to Reach $500 Trillion, Says Michael Saylor
data.description: According to PANews, Michael Saylor has expressed that Bitcoin's market capitalization is expected to eventually reach $500 trillion. This ambitious projection highlights the potential growth and influence of Bitcoin in the global financial landscape.

data.title: UniSat: Atomicals protocol will no longer be supported from April 4th, users are advised to transfer assets as soon as possible
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News UniSat posted on the X platform that it will no longer support the Atomicals protocol and will update the extended wallet to version 1.6.0 starting at 02:00 EST on April 4, 2025. It is recommended that users transfer their Atomicals assets to a compatible wallet as soon as possible. After April 4, Atomicals assets will not be viewable in the UniSat wallet.

data.title: Forget Bitcoin Price Tag—Arthur Hayes Says Liquidity Is the Real Trigger
data.description:
Bitcoin price sits at $87,013. 20 as of writing, down 0. 82% in 24 hours, per Coinmarketcap data. Traders obsess over the next big number—$100,000, $110,000, or even $1 million
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/28/forget-bitcoin-price-tag-arthur-hayes-says-liquidity-is-the-real-trigger/

data.title: Dog-eat-dog drama erupts in BNB Chain’s Broccoli token showdown
data.description:
Community members backing a Broccoli memecoin on BNB Chain are outraged, claiming their project was unfairly denied victory in the network’s liquidity support program. The BNB Chain Meme Liquidity Support Program, which kicked off on Feb. 18, offers $200,000 in permanent liquidity to the top-performing memecoins on the chain. But controversy erupted on day two of the competition on Feb
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/dog-eat-dog-drama-erupts-in-bnb-chain-s-broccoli-token-showdown?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: ARK Invest currently holds over $550 million worth of Coinbase shares
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: ARK Invest, owned by "Wood Sister" Cathie Wood, currently holds Coinbase shares worth more than $550 million through three ETFs, including: ARKK ($390.2 million), ARKW ($91.4 million), and ARKF ($70.2 million).
